title: Open items from a connected card in a new tab
excerpt:
How can I open a connected item from another board in a new browser tab? This function was available until end of June, by clicking on the speech bubble icon + press CTRL. Now it has changed :frowning: 
Is there another …

posts.author: AlexandraB (Alexandra Bitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I open a connected item from another board in a new browser tab? This function was available until end of June, by clicking on the speech bubble icon + press CTRL. Now it has changed
Is there another workaround?
